name: Central Chiang Rai / Robinson / Big C city retail core
capture_notes: Strongest destination-charging cluster: Central, Robinson, Big C, hospitals, city market/night activity. Competition likely high and must be verified.

name: Route 1 Rong Khun - Mae Korn high-AADT corridor
capture_notes: Highest AADT seed point 31,773; combines Route 1 traffic, White Temple tourism, and south-city approach.

name: Route 118 Mae Suai / Mae Kha Chan intercity corridor
capture_notes: Key Chiang Mai/Phayao-Chiang Rai corridor with high heavy-vehicle share; OSM charger candidate exists near Mae Kha Chan.

name: Airport - Ban Du - Mae Fah Luang University corridor
capture_notes: Airport, university, hospital, and north-city corridor demand. Useful for destination and commuter charging.

name: Mae Sai border gateway / Route 1 north
capture_notes: Border, retail, bus station, Makro/Lotus area and Route 1 north demand; verify cross-border/travel recovery and charger competition.

name: Chiang Khong / Mekong border corridor
capture_notes: Laos border and Route 1020/Chomphu-Chiang Khong corridor; population lower but gateway role matters.

name: Doi Tung - Golden Triangle tourism corridor
capture_notes: Tourism-heavy corridor; demand depends on tourist EV adoption and charging dwell opportunities.

name: Phan / Route 1 south district corridor
capture_notes: Large district population and Route 1 flow; better as corridor coverage unless strong retail/rest-stop host is identified.
